  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help
Spring Data Elasticsearch

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractElasticsearchRepositoryQuery
    AbstractElasticsearchRepositoryQuery
    AbstractElasticsearchTemplate
    This class contains methods that are common to different implementations of the ElasticsearchOperations interface that use different clients, like the different Java clients from Elasticsearch or some external implementation that might use a different client.
    AbstractElasticsearchTemplate.DocumentCallback<T>
     
    AbstractElasticsearchTemplate.SearchDocumentResponseCallback<T>
     
    AbstractPropertyValueConverter
     
    AbstractQueryProcessor
    An abstract class that serves as a base for query processors.
    AbstractRangePropertyValueConverter<T>
     
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate
    Base class keeping common code for implementations of the ReactiveElasticsearchOperations interface independent of the used client.
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.DocumentCallback<T>
    Callback to convert Document into an entity of type T
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.IndexResponseMetaData
    Value class to capture client independent information from a response to an index request.
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.SearchDocumentCallback<T>
    Callback to convert a SearchDocument into different other classes
    ActiveShardCount
    Class corresponding to the Elasticsearch class, but in the org.springframework.data.elasticsearch package
    AfterConvertCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked after a domain object is materialized from a Document when reading results.
    AfterLoadCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked after a Document is read from Elasticsearch and before it is converted into a domain object.
    AfterSaveCallback<T>
    Entity callback triggered after save of an entity.
    Aggregation
    Class to combine an Elasticsearch Aggregate with its name.
    AggregationContainer<T>
    Aggregation container used in the Spring Data Elasticsearch API for a single aggregation.
    AggregationsContainer<T>
    Aggregations container used in the Spring Data Elasticsearch API.
    Alias
    Identifies an alias for the index.
    Alias
    Immutable Value object encapsulating index alias(es).
    Alias.Builder
     
    AliasAction
    A single action to be contained in AliasActions.
    AliasAction.Add
    AliasAction to add an alias.
    AliasAction.Remove
    AliasAction to remove an alias.
    AliasAction.RemoveIndex
    AliasAction to remove an index.
    AliasActionParameters
    Value class capturing the arguments for an AliasAction.
    AliasActionParameters.Builder
     
    AliasActions
    Class to define to actions to execute in alias management functions.
    AliasData
    value object to describe alias information.
    Aliases
    Container annotation that aggregates several Alias annotations.
    AuditingEntityCallback
    EntityCallback to populate auditing related fields on an entity about to be saved.
    AutoCloseableElasticsearchClient
    Extension of the ElasticsearchClient class that implements AutoCloseable.
    BaseQuery
    BaseQuery
    BaseQueryBuilder<Q,SELF>
    base class for query builders.
    BeforeConvertCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked before a domain object is converted to be persisted.
    BitUtil
    /** Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/utils/BitUtil.java

    Utilities for common Bit twiddling methods.
    BulkFailureException
     
    BulkFailureException.FailureDetails
    Details about a document saving failure.
    BulkOptions
    Options that may be passed to an DocumentOperations.bulkIndex(List, BulkOptions, IndexCoordinates) or DocumentOperations.bulkUpdate(List, BulkOptions, IndexCoordinates) call.
    BulkOptions.BulkOptionsBuilder
    Builder for BulkOptions.
    ByQueryResponse
    Response of an update by query operation.
    ByQueryResponse.ByQueryResponseBuilder
     
    ByQueryResponse.Failure
     
    ByQueryResponse.Failure.FailureBuilder
    Builder for ByQueryResponse.Failure
    ByQueryResponse.SearchFailure
     
    ByQueryResponse.SearchFailure.SearchFailureBuilder
    Builder for ByQueryResponse.SearchFailure
    ChildTemplate<T,CLIENT>
    base class for a template that uses one of the ElasticsearchClient's child clients like ElasticsearchClusterClient or ElasticsearchIndicesClient.
    ChildTemplate.ClientCallback<CLIENT,RESULT>
    Callback interface to be used with ChildTemplate.execute(ClientCallback) for operating directly on the client.
    ClientConfiguration
    Configuration interface exposing common client configuration properties for Elasticsearch clients.
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationBuilderWithRequiredEndpoint
     
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback<T>
    Callback to be executed to configure a client.
    ClientConfiguration.MaybeSecureClientConfigurationBuilder
     
    ClientConfiguration.TerminalClientConfigurationBuilder
     
    ClusterHealth
    Information about the cluster health.
    ClusterHealth.ClusterHealthBuilder
     
    ClusterOperations
    Elasticsearch operations on cluster level.
    ClusterTemplate
    Implementation of the ClusterOperations interface using en ElasticsearchClusterClient.
    Completion
    Based on the reference doc - https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/search-suggesters-completion.html
    CompletionContext
    Based on reference doc - https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/suggester-context.html
    CompletionContext.ContextMappingType
     
    CompletionContextType
    Based on reference doc - https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/suggester-context.html
    CompletionField
    Based on the reference doc - https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/search-suggesters-completion.html
    CompletionSuggestion<T>
     
    CompletionSuggestion.Entry<T>
     
    CompletionSuggestion.Entry.Option<T>
     
    ComponentTemplateRequestData
    A component template to be used in a component template request.
    ComponentTemplateRequestData.Builder
     
    ConflictsType
    Define the types of conflicts that occur when a query encounters version conflicts.
    ConversionException
     
    CountQuery
    Alias for a @Query annotation with the count parameter set to true.
    CreateIndexSettings
    Encapsulating index mapping fields, settings, and index alias(es).
    CreateIndexSettings.Builder
     
    Criteria
    Criteria is the central class when constructing queries.
    Criteria.CriteriaChain
    a list of Criteria objects that belong to one query.
    Criteria.CriteriaEntry
    A class defining a single operation and it's argument value for the field of a Criteria.
    Criteria.OperationKey
     
    Criteria.Operator
    Operator to join the entries of the criteria chain
    CriteriaQuery
    CriteriaQuery
    CriteriaQueryBuilder
     
    CriteriaQueryException
     
    DateFormat
    Values based on Elasticsearch reference documentation.
    DateFormatter
    Interface to convert from and to TemporalAccessors.
    DatePropertyValueConverter
     
    DateRangePropertyValueConverter
     
    DefaultElasticsearchObservationConvention
    Default ElasticsearchObservationConvention implementation.
    DefaultElasticsearchTypeMapper
    Elasticsearch specific TypeMapper implementation.
    DefaultElasticsearchTypeMapper.MapTypeAliasAccessor
    TypeAliasAccessor to store aliases in a Map.
    DefaultRoutingResolver
    Default implementation of the RoutingResolver interface.
    DefaultStringObjectMap<T>
     
    DeleteComponentTemplateRequest
     
    DeleteIndexTemplateRequest
     
    DeleteQuery
    Defines a delete request.
    DeleteQuery.Builder
     
    DeleteTemplateRequest
     
    Document
    Identifies a domain object to be persisted to Elasticsearch.
    Document
    A representation of an Elasticsearch document as extended Map.
    Document.VersionType
    Note: the enum value FORCE, which was introduced in 4.4 has been removed again by Elasticsearch.
    DocumentOperations
    The operations for the Elasticsearch Document APIs.
    DocValueField
    Record defining a docvalue_field to be used in a query.
    Dynamic
    Values for the dynamic mapping parameter.
    DynamicTemplates
    Elasticsearch dynamic templates mapping.
    ElasticsearchAggregation
    AggregationContainer for a Aggregation that holds Elasticsearch data.
    ElasticsearchAggregations
    AggregationsContainer implementation for the Elasticsearch aggregations.
    ElasticsearchAotPredicates
     
    ElasticsearchAuditingBeanDefinitionParser
    BeanDefinitionParser to register a AuditingEntityCallback to transparently set auditing information on an entity.
    ElasticsearchClientBeanDefinitionParser
     
    ElasticsearchClientFactoryBean
    ElasticsearchClientFactoryBean
    ElasticsearchClientRuntimeHints
    runtime hints for the Elasticsearch client libraries, as these do not provide any of their own.
    ElasticsearchClients
    Utility class to create the different Elasticsearch clients.
    ElasticsearchCollectionValueToStringConverter
    Convert a collection into string for value part of the elasticsearch query.
    ElasticsearchConfiguration
    Base class for a @Configuration class to set up the Elasticsearch connection using the Elasticsearch Client.
    ElasticsearchConfigurationSupport
     
    ElasticsearchConverter
     
    ElasticsearchCustomConversions
    Elasticsearch specific CustomConversions.
    ElasticsearchDateConverter
    Provides Converter instances to convert to and from Dates in the different date and time formats that elasticsearch understands.
    ElasticsearchEntityInformation<T,ID>
     
    ElasticsearchEntityInformationCreator
    ElasticsearchEntityInformationCreator
    ElasticsearchEntityInformationCreatorImpl
    ElasticsearchEntityInformationCreatorImpl
    ElasticsearchEntityMetadata<T>
     
    ElasticsearchErrorCause
    Object describing an Elasticsearch error
    ElasticsearchExceptionTranslator
    Simple PersistenceExceptionTranslator for Elasticsearch.
    ElasticsearchHost
    Value Object containing information about Elasticsearch cluster nodes.
    ElasticsearchHost.State
     
    ElasticsearchLegacyRestClientConfiguration
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 6.0, use ElasticsearchConfiguration
    ElasticsearchNamespaceHandler
    ElasticsearchNamespaceHandler
    ElasticsearchObservation
    ObservationDocumentation for Spring Data Elasticsearch template operations.
    ElasticsearchObservationContext
    Observation.Context for Spring Data Elasticsearch operations.
    ElasticsearchObservationConvention
    ObservationConvention for Spring Data Elasticsearch operations.
    ElasticsearchOperationName
    Enumeration of Spring Data Elasticsearch operation names used in observations.
    ElasticsearchOperations
    ElasticsearchOperations.
    ElasticsearchParameter
    Custom Parameter implementation adding specific types to the special ones.
    ElasticsearchParameterAccessor
     
    ElasticsearchParameters
     
    ElasticsearchParametersParameterAccessor
     
    ElasticsearchPersistentEntity<T>
    ElasticsearchPersistentEntity
    ElasticsearchPersistentProperty
    ElasticsearchPersistentProperty
    ElasticsearchPersistentProperty.PropertyToFieldNameConverter
     
    ElasticsearchPersistentProperty.QueryPropertyToFieldNameConverter
    when building CriteriaQueries use the name; the fieldname is set later with ElasticsearchConverter.
    ElasticsearchQueryCreator
    ElasticsearchQueryCreator
    ElasticsearchQueryMethod
    ElasticsearchQueryMethod
    ElasticsearchQueryValueConversionService
    A ConversionService using custom converters to handle query values in elasticsearch query.
    ElasticsearchRepository<T,ID>
     
    ElasticsearchRepositoryBean<T>
    Uses CdiRepositoryBean to create ElasticsearchRepository instances.
    ElasticsearchRepositoryConfigExtension
    RepositoryConfigurationExtension implementation to configure Elasticsearch repository configuration support, evaluating the EnableElasticsearchRepositories annotation or the equivalent XML element.
    ElasticsearchRepositoryExtension
    CDI extension to export Elasticsearch repositories.
    ElasticsearchRepositoryFactory
    Factory to create ElasticsearchRepository
    ElasticsearchRepositoryFactoryBean<T,S,ID>
    Spring FactoryBean implementation to ease container based configuration for XML namespace and JavaConfig.
    ElasticsearchRepositoryMetadata
     
    ElasticsearchSimpleTypes
    Utility to define simple types understood by Spring Data Elasticsearch and the Elasticsearch client.
    ElasticsearchStringValueToStringConverter
    Values in elasticsearch query may contain quotations and should be escaped when converting.
    ElasticsearchTemplate
    Implementation of ElasticsearchOperations using the new Elasticsearch client.
    ElasticsearchTemplate.ClientCallback<T>
    Callback interface to be used with ElasticsearchTemplate.execute(ElasticsearchTemplate.ClientCallback) for operating directly on the ElasticsearchClient.
    ElasticsearchTypeMapper
    Elasticsearch specific TypeMapper definition.
    EnableElasticsearchAuditing
    Annotation to enable auditing in Elasticsearch via annotation configuration.
    EnableElasticsearchRepositories
    Annotation to enable Elasticsearch repositories.
    EnableReactiveElasticsearchAuditing
    Annotation to enable auditing in Elasticsearch using reactive infrastructure via annotation configuration.
    EnableReactiveElasticsearchRepositories
    Annotation to activate reactive Elasticsearch repositories.
    EntityAsMap
    A Map<String,Object> to represent any entity as it's returned from Elasticsearch and before it is converted to a Document.
    EntityOperations
    Common operations performed on an entity in the context of it's mapping metadata.
    EntityOperations.AdaptableEntity<T>
    Information and commands on an entity.
    ExceptionUtils
     
    ExistsComponentTemplateRequest
     
    ExistsIndexTemplateRequest
     
    ExistsTemplateRequest
     
    Explanation
    class that holds explanations returned from an Elasticsearch search.
    FetchSourceFilter
    SourceFilter implementation for providing includes and excludes.
    FetchSourceFilterBuilder
    SourceFilter builder for providing includes and excludes.
    Field
     
    Field
    Defines a Field that can be used within a Criteria.
    FieldElementType
     
    FieldType
     
    Filter
    Query used to limit documents.
    GeoBox
    Geo bbox used for #Criteria.
    GeoConverters
    Set of converters specific to Elasticsearch Geo types.
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonGeometryCollectionToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonLineStringToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonMultiLineStringToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonMultiPointToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonMultiPolygonToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonPointToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonPolygonToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoJsonToMapConverter
     
    GeoConverters.GeoPointToMapConverter
    Converter to write a GeoPoint to Map using lat/long properties.
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonGeometryCollectionConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonLineStringConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonMultiLineStringConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonMultiPointConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonMultiPolygonConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonPointConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoJsonPolygonConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToGeoPointConverter
     
    GeoConverters.MapToPointConverter
    Converter to read a Point from Map using lat/long properties.
    GeoConverters.PointToMapConverter
    Converter to write a Point to Map using lat/long properties.
    GeoDistanceOrder
    Sort.Order derived class to be able to define a _geo_distance order for a search.
    GeoDistanceOrder.DistanceType
     
    Geohash
    Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/utils/Geohash.java

    Utilities for converting to/from the GeoHash standard The geohash long format is represented as lon/lat (x/y) interleaved with the 4 least significant bits representing the level (1-12) [xyxy...xyxyllll] This differs from a morton encoded value which interleaves lat/lon (y/x).
    GeoJson<T>
    Interface definition for structures defined in GeoJSON format. copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonGeometryCollection
    Defines a GeoJsonGeometryCollection that consists of a List of GeoJson objects.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonLineString
    GeoJsonLineString is defined as list of Points.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonMultiLineString
    GeoJsonMultiLineString is defined as list of GeoJsonLineStrings.
    GeoJsonMultiPoint
    GeoJsonMultiPoint is defined as list of Points.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb
    GeoJsonMultiPolygon
    GeoJsonMultiPolygon is defined as a list of GeoJsonPolygons.
    Copied fro Spring Data Mongodb.
    GeoJsonPoint
    GeoJson representation of Point.
    Copied from Spring Data Mongodb, not derived from Point as this conflicts with the already existing converter for Point in GeoConverters.
    GeoJsonPolygon
    GeoJson representation of a polygon.
    Geometry
    Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/Geometry.java

    Base class for all Geometry objects supported by elasticsearch
    GeometryValidator
    /** Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/utils/GeometryValidator.java

    Generic geometry validator that can be used by the parser to verify the validity of the parsed geometry
    GeometryVisitor<T,E>
    Support class for creating Geometry Visitors.
    GeoPoint
    geo-location used for #Criteria.
    GeoPointField
     
    GeoShapeField
     
    GeoShapeField.Orientation
     
    GetComponentTemplateRequest
     
    GetIndexTemplateRequest
     
    GetTemplateRequest
     
    HasChildQuery
    Defines a has_child request.
    HasChildQuery.Builder
     
    HasChildQuery.ScoreMode
     
    HasParentQuery
    Defines a has_parent request.
    HasParentQuery.Builder
     
    Highlight
     
    Highlight
     
    HighlightCommonParameters
     
    HighlightCommonParameters.HighlightCommonParametersBuilder<SELF>
     
    HighlightConverter
    Convert Highlight to Highlight.
    HighlightField
     
    HighlightField
     
    HighlightFieldParameters
     
    HighlightFieldParameters.HighlightFieldParametersBuilder
     
    HighlightParameters
     
    HighlightParameters
     
    HighlightParameters.HighlightParametersBuilder
     
    HighlightQuery
    Combines a Highlight definition with the type of the entity where it's present on a method.
    HttpHeaders
    A simple class implementing HTTP headers as a MultiValueMap.
    IndexBoost
    Defines a IndexBoost to be applied on the "indices_boost" query clause
    IndexCoordinates
    Immutable Value object encapsulating index name(s) and index type(s).
    IndexedIndexName
    Annotation to mark a String property of an entity to be filled with the name of the index where the entity was stored after it is indexed into Elasticsearch.
    IndexedObjectInformation
    Value class capturing information about a newly indexed document in Elasticsearch.
    IndexInformation
    Immutable object that holds information(name, settings, mappings, aliases) about an Index
    IndexOperations
    The operations for the Elasticsearch Index APIs.
    IndexOperationsAdapter
    Adapter for creating synchronous calls for a reactive ReactiveIndexOperations.
    IndexOptions
     
    IndexPrefixes
     
    IndexQuery
    IndexQuery
    IndexQuery.OpType
    OpType for the index operation.
    IndexQueryBuilder
    IndexQuery Builder
    IndicesOptions
    Class mirroring the IndicesOptions from Elasticsearch in Spring Data Elasticsearch API.
    IndicesOptions.Option
     
    IndicesOptions.WildcardStates
     
    IndicesTemplate
    Implementation of the IndexOperations interface using en ElasticsearchIndicesClient.
    InetSocketAddressParser
    Utility to parse endpoints in host:port format into InetSocketAddress.
    InnerField
     
    InnerHitsQuery
    Defines an inner_hits request.
    InnerHitsQuery.Builder
     
    JoinField<ID>
     
    JoinTypeRelation
     
    JoinTypeRelations
     
    KebabCaseFieldNamingStrategy
     
    KnnAlgorithmType
     
    KnnIndexOptions
     
    KnnSimilarity
     
    Mapping
    Elasticsearch Mapping
    Mapping.Detection
     
    MappingAlias
    Defines a field alias in the index mapping.
    MappingBuilder
     
    MappingConversionException
     
    MappingElasticsearchConverter
    Elasticsearch specific EntityConverter implementation based on domain type metadata.
    MappingElasticsearchEntityInformation<T,ID>
    Elasticsearch specific implementation of AbstractEntityInformation
    MappingParameters
    A class to hold the mapping parameters that might be set on Field or InnerField annotation.
    MappingParametersCustomizer
    Allows to customize MappingParameters that are being emitted for each supported annotation.
    MoreLikeThisQuery
    MoreLikeThisQuery
    MultiField
     
    MultiGetItem<T>
    Response object for items returned from multiget requests, encapsulating the returned data and potential error information.
    MultiGetItem.Failure
     
    NativeQuery
    A Query implementation using query builders from the new Elasticsearch Client library.
    NativeQueryBuilder
     
    NestedMetaData
    meta data returned for nested inner hits.
    NoReachableHostException
    RuntimeException to be emitted / thrown when the cluster is down (aka none of the known nodes is reachable).
    NoSuchIndexException
     
    NullValueType
     
    NumberRangePropertyValueConverter
     
    OperatorType
    Define the default operator for a query string query.
    Order
    Extends the Sort.Order with properties that can be set on Elasticsearch order options.
    Order.Mode
     
    Order.Nested
     
    Order.Nested.Builder
     
    PersistentEntitiesFactoryBean
    Simple helper to be able to wire the PersistentEntities from a MappingElasticsearchConverter bean available in the application context.
    PhraseSuggestion
     
    PhraseSuggestion.Entry
     
    PhraseSuggestion.Entry.Option
     
    Point
    /** Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/Point.java

    Represents a Point on the earth's surface in decimal degrees and optional altitude in meters.
    PropertyValueConverter
    Interface defining methods to convert the value of an entity-property to a value in Elasticsearch and back.
    PutComponentTemplateRequest
     
    PutComponentTemplateRequest.Builder
     
    PutIndexTemplateRequest
     
    PutIndexTemplateRequest.Builder
     
    PutTemplateRequest
    Request to create an index template.
    PutTemplateRequest.TemplateRequestBuilder
     
    Queries
    Utility class simplifying the creation of some more complex queries and type.
    Query
    Query
    Query
    Query
    Query.IdWithRouting
    Value class combining an id with a routing value.
    Query.PointInTime
    Desscribes the point in time parameters for a query
    Query.SearchType
     
    QueryByExampleElasticsearchExecutor<T>
     
    QueryStringPlaceholderReplacer
    To replace the placeholders like `?
    QueryStringProcessor
    To process query strings with placeholder replacement and SpEL evaluation by QueryStringPlaceholderReplacer and QueryStringSpELEvaluator.
    QueryStringSpELEvaluator
    To evaluate the SpEL expressions of the query string.
    ReactiveAfterConvertCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked after a domain object is materialized from a Document when reading results.
    ReactiveAfterLoadCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked after a Document is read from Elasticsearch and before it is converted into a domain object.
    ReactiveAfterSaveCallback<T>
    Entity callback triggered after save of an entity.
    ReactiveAuditingEntityCallback
    EntityCallback to populate auditing related fields on an entity about to be saved.
    ReactiveBeforeConvertCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked before a domain object is converted to be persisted.
    ReactiveChildTemplate<T,CLIENT>
    base class for a reactive template that uses on of the ReactiveElasticsearchClient's child clients.
    ReactiveChildTemplate.ClientCallback<CLIENT,RESULT>
    Callback interface to be used with ReactiveChildTemplate.execute(ClientCallback) for operating directly on the client.
    ReactiveClusterOperations
    Reactive Elasticsearch operations on cluster level.
    ReactiveClusterTemplate
     
    ReactiveDocumentOperations
    The reactive operations for the Elasticsearch Document APIs.
    ReactiveElasticsearchClient
    Reactive version of ElasticsearchClient.
    ReactiveElasticsearchClusterClient
    Reactive version of the ElasticsearchClusterClient
    ReactiveElasticsearchConfiguration
    Base class for a @Configuration class to set up the Elasticsearch connection using the ReactiveElasticsearchClient.
    ReactiveElasticsearchIndicesClient
    Reactive version of the ElasticsearchIndicesClient
    ReactiveElasticsearchLegacyRestClientConfiguration
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 6.0 use ReactiveElasticsearchConfiguration
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    Interface that specifies a basic set of Elasticsearch operations executed in a reactive way.
    ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution
     
    ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution.ResultProcessingConverter
    A Converter to post-process all source objects using the given ResultProcessor.
    ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution.ResultProcessingExecution
    An ReactiveElasticsearchQueryExecution that wraps the results of the given delegate with the given result processing.
    ReactiveElasticsearchQueryMethod
     
    ReactiveElasticsearchRepository<T,ID>
    Elasticsearch specific Repository interface with reactive support.
    ReactiveElasticsearchRepositoryConfigurationExtension
     
    ReactiveElasticsearchRepositoryFactory
    Factory to create ReactiveElasticsearchRepository instances.
    ReactiveElasticsearchRepositoryFactoryBean<T,S,ID>
    FactoryBean to create ReactiveElasticsearchRepository instances.
    ReactiveElasticsearchRepositoryMetadata
     
    ReactiveElasticsearchSqlClient
    Reactive version of ElasticsearchSqlClient.
    ReactiveElasticsearchTemplate
    Implementation of ReactiveElasticsearchOperations using the new Elasticsearch client.
    ReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.ClientCallback<T>
    Callback interface to be used with
    invalid @link 
    {@link #execute(ReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.ClientCallback<>)
    } for operating directly on ReactiveElasticsearchClient.
    ReactiveIndexOperations
    Interface defining operations on indexes for the reactive stack.
    ReactiveIndicesTemplate
     
    ReactiveMappingBuilder
    Subclass of MappingBuilder with specialized methods To inhibit blocking calls
    ReactivePartTreeElasticsearchQuery
     
    ReactiveQueryByExampleElasticsearchExecutor<T>
     
    ReactiveRepositorySearchTemplateQuery
    A reactive repository query that uses a search template already stored in Elasticsearch.
    ReactiveRepositoryStringQuery
    Was originally named ReactiveElasticsearchStringQuery.
    ReactiveResourceUtil
    Utility to reactively read Resources.
    ReactiveScriptOperations
    This interfaces defines the operations to access the Elasticsearch script API.
    ReactiveSearchHits<T>
    Encapsulates a Flux of SearchHits with additional information from the search.
    ReactiveSearchHitsImpl<T>
     
    ReactiveSearchHitSupport
     
    ReactiveSearchOperations
    The reactive operations for the Elasticsearch Document APIs.
    ReactiveSqlOperations
    The reactive version of operations for the SQL search API.
    Rectangle
    Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/Rectangle.java

    Represents a lat/lon rectangle in decimal degrees and optional altitude in meters.
    RefreshPolicy
    Enum defining the refresh policy.
    ReindexRequest
    Request to reindex some documents from one index to another.
    ReindexRequest.Conflicts
     
    ReindexRequest.Dest
     
    ReindexRequest.ReindexRequestBuilder
     
    ReindexRequest.Script
     
    ReindexRequest.Slice
     
    ReindexRequest.Source
     
    ReindexResponse
    Response of reindex request.
    ReindexResponse.Failure
     
    ReindexResponse.Failure.FailureBuilder
    Builder for ReindexResponse.Failure
    ReindexResponse.ReindexResponseBuilder
     
    Remote
    Remote info (@see https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/docs-reindex.html#source)
    Remote.RemoteBuilder
     
    RepositoryPartQuery
    A repository query that is built from the the method name in the repository definition.
    RepositoryRuntimeHints
     
    RepositorySearchTemplateQuery
    A repository query that uses a search template already stored in Elasticsearch.
    RepositoryStringQuery
    A repository query that is defined by a String containing the query.
    RescorerQuery
    Implementation of RescorerQuery to be used for rescoring filtered search results.
    RescorerQuery.ScoreMode
     
    ResourceFailureException
     
    ResourceNotFoundException
     
    ResourceUtil
    Utility to read Resources.
    Rest5Clients
    Utility class containing the functions to create the Elasticsearch Rest5Client used from Elasticsearch 9 on.
    Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchConnectionConfigurationCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Elasticsearch Rest5Client's connection with a ConnectionConfig.Builder
    Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchConnectionManagerCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Elasticsearch Rest5Client's connection manager with a PoolingAsyncClientConnectionManagerBuilder
    Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchHttpClientConfigurationCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Elasticsearch Rest5Client's Http client with a HttpAsyncClientBuilder
    Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchRequestConfigCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Elasticsearch Rest5Client's connection manager with a RequestConfig.Builder
    Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchRest5ClientConfigurationCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Rest5Client client with a Rest5ClientBuilder
    RestClients
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 6.0, use the new Rest5Client the code for that is in the package ..
    RestClients.ElasticsearchHttpClientConfigurationCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Elasticsearch RestClient's Http client with a HttpAsyncClientBuilder
    RestClients.ElasticsearchRestClientConfigurationCallback
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the RestClient client with a RestClientBuilder
    RestStatusException
    Exception class for REST status exceptions independent from the used client/backend.
    Routing
    Annotation to enable custom routing values for an entity.
    RoutingResolver
     
    RuntimeField
    Defines a runtime field to be added to a Query
    ScoreDoc
     
    Script
     
    Script.ScriptBuilder
     
    ScriptData
    value class combining script information.
    ScriptData.Builder
     
    ScriptedField
    Marks a property to be populated with the result of a scripted field retrieved from an Elasticsearch response.
    ScriptedField
    Class defining a scripted field to be used in a Query.
    ScriptOperations
    This interfaces defines the operations to access the Elasticsearch script API.
    ScrollState
    Mutable state object holding scrollId to be used for scroll requests.
    SearchDocument
    Extension to Document exposing search response related data.
    SearchDocumentAdapter
    SearchDocument implementation using a Document delegate.
    SearchDocumentResponse
    This represents the complete search response from Elasticsearch, including the returned documents.
    SearchDocumentResponse.EntityCreator<T>
    A function to convert a SearchDocument async into an entity.
    SearchHit<T>
    Encapsulates the found data with additional information from the search.
    SearchHitMapping<T>
     
    SearchHits<T>
    Encapsulates a list of SearchHits with additional information from the search.
    SearchHitsImpl<T>
    Basic implementation of SearchScrollHits
    SearchHitsIterator<T>
    A SearchHitsIterator encapsulates SearchHit results that can be wrapped in a Java 8 Stream.
    SearchHitSupport
    Utility class with helper methods for working with SearchHit.
    SearchOperations
    The operations for the Elasticsearch Document APIs.
    SearchPage<T>
    Page definition for repositories that need to return a paged SearchHits.
    SearchScrollHits<T>
    This interface is used to expose the current scrollId from the underlying scroll context.
    SearchShardStatistics
     
    SearchShardStatistics.Failure
     
    SearchTemplateQuery
    Annotation to mark a repository method as a search template method.
    SearchTemplateQuery
     
    SearchTemplateQueryBuilder
     
    SeqNoPrimaryTerm
    A container for seq_no and primary_term values.
    Setting
    Elasticsearch Setting
    Setting.SortMissing
     
    Setting.SortMode
     
    Setting.SortOrder
     
    Settings
    class defining the settings for an index.
    ShapeType
    Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/ShapeType.java

    Shape types supported by elasticsearch
    Similarity
     
    SimpleElasticsearchEntityMetadata<T>
     
    SimpleElasticsearchMappingContext
    SimpleElasticsearchMappingContext
    SimpleElasticsearchPersistentEntity<T>
    Elasticsearch specific PersistentEntity implementation holding
    SimpleElasticsearchPersistentEntity.ContextConfiguration
    Configuration settings passed in from the creating SimpleElasticsearchMappingContext.
    SimpleElasticsearchPersistentProperty
    Elasticsearch specific PersistentProperty implementation processing
    SimpleElasticsearchRepository<T,ID>
    Elasticsearch specific repository implementation.
    SimpleElasticsearchRepository.OperationsCallback<R>
     
    SimpleField
    The most trivial implementation of a Field.
    SimpleReactiveElasticsearchRepository<T,ID>
     
    SortBy
     
    SourceFilter
    SourceFilter for providing includes and excludes.
    SourceFilters
    This annotation can be placed on repository methods to define the properties that should be requested from Elasticsearch when the method is run.
    SpringDataElasticsearchRuntimeHints
     
    SqlOperations
    The operations for the SQL search API.
    SqlQuery
    Defines an SQL request.
    SqlQuery.Builder
     
    SqlResponse
    Defines an SQL response.
    SqlResponse.Builder
     
    SqlResponse.Column
     
    SqlResponse.Row
     
    SqlResponse.Row.Builder
     
    StandardValidator
    Code copied from Elasticsearch 7.10, Apache License V2 https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/7.10/libs/geo/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/geometry/utils/StandardValidator.java

    Validator that only checks that altitude only shows up if ignoreZValue is set to true.
    StringObjectMap<M>
    Defines an interface for a Map<String, Object> with additional convenience methods.
    StringQuery
    StringQuery
    StringQueryBuilder
     
    Suggest
    Class structure mirroring the Elasticsearch classes for a suggest response.
    Suggest.Suggestion<E>
     
    Suggest.Suggestion.Entry<O>
     
    Suggest.Suggestion.Entry.Option
     
    TemplateData
    Data returned for template information retrieval.
    TemplateData.TemplateDataBuilder
     
    TemplateResponse
     
    TemplateResponse.Builder
     
    TemplateResponseData
     
    TemplateResponseData.Builder
     
    TemporalPropertyValueConverter
     
    TemporalRangePropertyValueConverter
     
    TermSuggestion
     
    TermSuggestion.Entry
     
    TermSuggestion.Entry.Option
     
    TermVector
     
    TotalHitsRelation
    Enum to represent the relation that Elasticsearch returns for the totalHits value
    UncategorizedElasticsearchException
     
    UnsupportedBackendOperation
    Exception to be thrown by a backend implementation on operations that are not supported for that backend.
    UnsupportedClientOperationException
     
    UpdateQuery
    Defines an update request.
    UpdateQuery.Builder
     
    UpdateResponse
    Response data from an update request (UpdateQuery).
    UpdateResponse.Result
     
    ValueConverter
    Annotation to put on a property of an entity to define a value converter which can convert the property to a type that Elasticsearch understands and back.
    Version
    A version defined by 3 parts: major minor and revision number.
    VersionConflictException
    Exception that is thrown when a version conflict from the server is detected.
    VersionInfo
    This class is used to log the versions of Spring Data Elasticsearch, the Elasticsearch client libs used to built, the Elasticsearch client libs currently used and of the Elasticsearch cluster.
    WellKnownText
    Utility class for converting to and from WKT
    WriteOnlyProperty
    Annotation to mark a property that will be written to Elasticsearch, but not set when reading from Elasticsearch.
    WriteTypeHint
    Defines if type hints should be written.
